currentProviderGaps.create_with_distributions: writes the external API but does not persist project or distribution identifiers in the local ledger
currentProviderGaps.sync_mcn_inquiry_status: records sync metadata only; it does not query provider state or upsert mcn_inquiries
currentProviderGaps.maximumRecoverablePhase: mcn_planning until provider inquiry sync is implemented

policies.outwardSendConfirmation: first create_with_distributions invocation is blocked locally with exact AskUserQuestion arguments; only a confirmed answer authorizes one subsequent invocation with the same parameter fingerprint
policies.fieldSelectionBinding: selected columns remain preparation evidence until a real distribution is committed
policies.stateRefresh: read local JSON on every prompt; use get_workflow_state only for context loss or unknown write reconciliation
policies.unknownWriteRecovery: current provider: get_workflow_state by demand identity from existing business facts; ledger trace_id reconciliation is target-only and an unknown external create remains blocked; never blind retry
policies.postValidationContinuation: a successful validate_requirement result immediately continues to search_creators in the same turn
policies.postSearchContinuation: a successful search_creators result renders the fixed supply-demand summary and waits for explicit user confirmation before rank_mcns
policies.mcnRace: rank_mcns uses a confirmed dynamic race size; never hardcode five recommendations and display institution names instead of IDs
policies.manualSourcingPlacement: optional pre-send enrichment only; never proves distribution or recovery
policies.rankCreatorsPrerequisite: committed WeCom distribution plus completed recovery

guards: payload matches live schema

the user confirmed the fixed search supply-demand summary
minimum_mcn_count is derived dynamically instead of fixed at five
the MCN race result and institution choices are confirmed
the returned field description is actual Provider evidence
evidence: successful field-list response recorded in local JSON

guards: supply, MCN, and field choices are present in local orchestration state
the exact multiline AskUserQuestion prompt and subsequent create_with_distributions parameters match the one-time confirmation receipt
requirement_id, supplierIds, columns, and a plain-text WeChat-message description resolve one requirement
evidence: actual successful external distribution response recorded in local JSON

guards: real project and distribution identifiers resolve to the same requirement and supplier

evidence: target-only: authoritative provider distribution mirrored to mcn_inquiries; current provider does not produce this evidence
